summary_en: 1,210,000 shares (6.21% of shares outstanding) acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on 29 May 2026 at ¥1,087/share ceiling, aggregate ¥1,315.3M, single-block transaction, execution window 29 May 8:45 JST.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Share Buyback via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 28 May 2026, the board of Rokko Butter resolved to acquire treasury stock via off-hours trading. The company will execute a single block purchase of 1,210,000 ordinary shares (6.21% of issued shares outstanding) on 29 May 2026 at 8:45 JST via ToSTNeT-3 at the previous close of ¥1,087 per share, with aggregate consideration of ¥1,315.27M. The order is time-limited to the specified trading window; partial or full non-execution is possible depending on market conditions. The stated rationale is to strengthen shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency while investing in equipment and human capital for future business development.
